sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me verify current bottom-right state and check all reference grids
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
cell_map = {}
for node in nodes:
    if node['pixels'] == 36:
        r = node['boundary'][0][0]
        c = node['boundary'][0][1]
        cell_map[(r, c)] = node['color']

bottom_right = []
for r in [36, 44, 52]:
    row = []
    for c in [36, 44, 52]:
        row.append(cell_map.get((r, c), '?'))
    bottom_right.append(row)

print("Bottom-right (current):")
for row in bottom_right: print(f"  {' '.join(row)}")

# Check all reference grids
top_left = [['b', 'R', 'b'], ['R', '?', 'b'], ['b', 'R', 'R']]
top_right = [['b', 'R', 'b'], ['R', '?', 'R'], ['b', 'R', 'b']]
bottom_left = [['R', 'b', 'b'], ['R', '?', 'R'], ['b', 'b', 'R']]

print("Matches top-left?", bottom_right == top_left)
print("Matches top-right?", bottom_right == top_right)
print("Matches bottom-left?", bottom_right == bottom_left)

# Check center cells
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nBottom-right center:")
for r in range(44, 50):
    print(f"  {ascii_lines[r][44:50]}")

print("\nTop-right center:")
for r in range(10, 16):
    print(f"  {ascii_lines[r][46:52]}")

# Try clicking on gray regions in center to toggle them
# Gray regions in bottom-right center:
# Top-right: rows 44-45, cols 46-49 -> click at 44, 47
# Bottom: rows 48-49, cols 46-49 -> click at 48, 47

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 44, 'col': 47}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
